title: Java Switch Expression
description: Return a value from a switch expression with arrow labels and yield.
learningGoals: Produce a value from a switch expression using arrow labels.
Recall that switch expressions must be exhaustive and block arms return with yield.

completionChecks.prompt: What would happen if default -> 0 were removed?
choices: The switch expression would not be exhaustive
The method would return -1 for unknown seasons
The switch would become a statement automatically
An exception would be thrown only when season is null
completionChecks.explanation: A switch expression over String needs a catch-all path such as default because the compiler cannot know all strings.

choices: Compilation fails because yield cannot appear in a switch expression
completionChecks.explanation: The autumn arm enters the block, sets base to 90, and yield supplies base + 1 as the switch expression value.

completionChecks.prompt: What happens if seasonDays(null) is called?
choices: NullPointerException is thrown before default can return 0
0 is returned by the default arm
93 is returned because null matches the first arm
Compilation fails because the selector might be null
completionChecks.explanation: A default label is not a null label; the trap is assuming default handles null selectors in a switch expression.
